description: Power buildout canary (T-9/T-6). CAISO interconnection queue MW by fuel/county + EIA-860M planned uprates + EIA-861M industrial load by state. Hotspots need 2+ independent legs; withdrawal/completion ratios published. ERCOT/PJM/MISO declared gaps.

schedule.description: Grid queue canary — daily 12:50 UTC (CAISO republishes weekly; EIA monthly)
